widgets_values: Cinematic scenes, high quality photography, photorealistic
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

<<< For Sampling - Part 1 , Text prompt only.  

Extend Video Text prompts , use "Travel Prompt for Extend Video"

Travel Prompt Should be based on Number Of Extend.

One row = One Prompt

Press Enter to write another line = Text Prompt for another Video Extend.

E.g: 

726 Total Frames , FPS 25
= 29 Seconds video

If we use 121 frames for each sampling
= 6 video sampling times

No. 1 >>> Sampling - Part 1

No. 2-6 >>>> In Video Extend Loop
Two masked soldiers in tactical black gear stand cautiously next to a tall barbed-wire fence at night, dim moonlight shining on them. Both are visible side by side, carrying gear. ghibli anime style

One masked soldier kneels at the locked gate with a small handheld scanner while the other stands guard, scanning the area. The device emits a faint glow as it’s pressed to the lock.Close-up of the lock as it clicks open with a soft beep. Sparks of light reflect on the metal, while the two soldiers prepare to move.
The two masked soldiers run fast across the open ground toward the main facility, low and agile, their gear bouncing as they move.A third masked soldier runs in behind them, carrying a large duffel bag, his posture heavy with the load.
A quadruped robot with metallic legs and glowing sensors sprints silently, quickly catching up to the soldiers, its movement animal-like but mechanical.A vehicle sits behind them with headlights dimmed, faint light cutting through the night fog. The soldiers pause as they sense it.
From behind the vehicle steps a second quadruped security robot with glowing red eyes, standing menacingly in the dim light.The security robot projects a warning in mechanical voice, its speakers glowing faintly as the echo spreads across the compound. Soldiers look tense.
The two robots face each other. The security robot locks into an aggressive stance as the operative’s robot braces, both ready to charge.The two quadruped robots collide violently, metal claws scraping, sparks flying as they tear at each other.
The soldier’s robot rips the security robot’s head off, sparks and dangling cables falling to the ground. The victorious robot turns back toward the soldiers.One soldier kneels by the robot, pats its head like a loyal dog, while the others watch silently in approval.

groups.title: Step 2 - Travel Prompt for Extend Video
